The '''Chempat-6''' was a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] manufactured by [[Chempat Engineered Defenses]]. The [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] was equipped with a pair of such generators for defensive purposes.

{{Tech-stub}}
